insights.title: Needs attention
insights.revenue_up_clients_down: Revenue is up but active clients are down — check for churn
insights.clients_at_risk: {{count}} client(s) haven't attended in over 3 weeks — churn risk
insights.lesson_overfull: "{{name}}" on {{weekday, weekday}} at {{hour}}:00 has been {{pct}}% full for three weeks in a row — consider adding another session
insights.trial_low_conversion: Only {{pct}}% of {{buyers}} trial buyers went on to buy a subscription — consider a campaign
insights.fastest_growing_product: "{{name}}" is growing fastest: +{{pct}}% vs the previous period
insights.renewals_low: Only {{pct}}% of clients with an expired subscription renew — consider a reminder
insights.new_no_second_visit: {{count}} new clients came once and never booked again — consider a reminder
insights.subs_expiring_week: {{count}} clients have a subscription expiring this week — consider offering a renewal
insights.vip_inactive: VIP client "{{name}}" hasn't visited in {{days}} days — consider a personal message
insights.high_return_free_evenings: "{{name}}" has a high return rate ({{return_pct}}%) but evenings are free — add a session
insights.trainer_overloaded: "{{name}}" is loaded at {{load_pct}}% — consider rebalancing the schedule
insights.low_rating: "{{name}}" has a rating of {{rating}} — worth a closer look
insights.slot_chronic_low: "{{name}}" on {{weekday, isodowWeekday}} at {{hour}}:00 has been {{pct}}% full for {{weeks}} weeks in a row — move or cancel it
insights.hall_idle_evenings: "{{name}}" is idle {{pct}}% of evening hours — consider scheduling a session
insights.slot_overfull: The {{weekday, isodowWeekday}} {{hour}}:00 slot has been {{pct}}% full for three weeks in a row — consider adding another session

noData.title: Nothing here yet
noData.text: No activity was recorded for the selected period. Widen the range, or start by booking a client in the Journal.

empty.noProducts: No packages or services sold yet
empty.noTrainerLessons: This trainer hasn't held any lessons yet

clients.emptySegment: The "{{name}}" segment has no clients right now

vip_idle.name: VIP idle
vip_idle.desc: VIP clients, no visit for 14+ days

salesCount.title: Sales
salesCount.text: How many times clients paid you this period. One person paying more than once counts as separate sales.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.text: All the money that came into the studio this period, by payment date. Packages, single sessions, gift cards and retail — all together.

profit.title: Profit
profit.text: What's left after this period's expenses: rent, salaries, supplies. This is your actual take-home.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.text: How many visits clients actually made. Only sessions marked as attended are counted.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.text: How many bookings clients made for sessions. Cancelled bookings aren't counted.

noshow.title: No-show
noshow.text: A client booked, the session happened, and they didn't show up. Each one is a spot someone else could have taken.

activeClients.title: Active clients
activeClients.text: How many different people came in at least once this period. Each client counts once, no matter how many visits they made.

occupancy.title: Occupancy
occupancy.text: How full your sessions are: spots filled out of what you scheduled. 100% means no room left.

avgCheck.title: Average check
avgCheck.text: What one payment brings in on average. It goes up when clients buy longer packages or add extras.

retention.title: Retention
retention.text: How many of last period's clients came back this period. Shows whether you're keeping people or starting from zero every month.

newClients.title: New clients
newClients.text: People who showed up in your client base for the first time this period.

returning.title: Returning
returning.text: Clients who visited before and came back again this period.

lost.title: Lost
lost.text: Visited last period and haven't shown up once this period. Still worth reaching out to them.

clientValue.title: Client value
clientValue.text: What one client brings in on average this period.

repeatPurchaseShare.title: Repeat purchase share
repeatPurchaseShare.text: Share of clients who bought from you more than once. The higher it is, the stronger the habit of coming back to you.

renewalRate.title: Renewal rate
renewalRate.text: How many clients bought a new package after their previous one ran out.

revenuePerHour.title: Revenue per hour (trainer)
revenuePerHour.text: How much money one hour of a trainer's work brings in. Lets you compare trainers fairly — one may teach fewer sessions but each one pays more.

trainerReturnRate.title: Return rate (trainer)
trainerReturnRate.text: Share of a trainer's clients who booked with them again.

missedRevenue.title: Missed revenue
missedRevenue.text: Money the studio didn't earn because of empty spots in past sessions: free spots multiplied by the session price.

lessonRevenue.title: Lesson revenue
lessonRevenue.text: A rough estimate of a session's revenue: attendees multiplied by price. Payments aren't tied to a specific session, so this is an approximation, not an exact figure.

filtersScope.title: Filter scope
filtersScope.text: The Branch and Hall filters only affect session-based metrics. Payments aren't linked to a hall, so money is shown studio-wide.

avgValue.title: Client value
avgValue.text: What one client brings in on average this period.

cancelNoshow.title: Cancels and no-shows
cancelNoshow.text: Share of disrupted sessions: cancellations and no-shows out of everything scheduled.

avgRating.title: Average rating
avgRating.text: The average rating clients gave this trainer's sessions.

teamScope.title: Data scope
teamScope.text: This only counts revenue linked to a specific trainer, so the total across all trainers can be less than the studio's overall revenue.

lessonsCount.title: Lessons
lessonsCount.text: How many sessions trainers held this period.

load.title: Load
load.text: How packed a trainer's day is: their booked hours out of the studio's working window.
